CREATE USER test_user WITH UNENCRYPTED PASSWORD 'password123';
ALTER USER test_user SET SCHEMA my_schema;
ALTER USER test_user WITH ENCRYPTED PASSWORD 'securepassword123' SET SCHEMA another_schema;
ALTER USER test_user SET SCHEMA my_schema, SCHEMA PATH 'path1,path2,path3';
ALTER USER test_user SET DEFAULT ROLE admin, MAX_MEMORY 100000, MAX_WORKERS 4;
ALTER USER test_user WITH UNENCRYPTED PASSWORD 'newpassword' SET SCHEMA test_schema, MAX_MEMORY NO MAX_MEMORY;
ALTER USER test_user SET SCHEMA (SELECT schema_name FROM sys.schemas WHERE schema_id < 10);
ALTER USER test_user SET SCHEMA 'schema1', 'schema2', DEFAULT ROLE 'user_role';
ALTER USER test_user SET SCHEMA my_schema, MAX_WORKERS (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys.workers WHERE status = 'active');
CREATE USER complex_user WITH UNENCRYPTED PASSWORD 'complexpass';
ALTER USER complex_user SET SCHEMA complex_schema, SCHEMA PATH 'complex_path1,complex_path2';
ALTER USER complex_user SET MAX_MEMORY 204800, MAX_WORKERS 8;
ALTER USER complex_user SET DEFAULT ROLE (SELECT role_name FROM sys.roles WHERE is_active = true LIMIT 1);
ALTER USER test_user SET SCHEMA (SELECT schema_name FROM sys.schemas WHERE schema_id = (SELECT MAX(schema_id) FROM sys.schemas));
ALTER USER test_user SET SCHEMA 'schema1', MAX_MEMORY 50000, SCHEMA PATH 'schema3,schema4';
